proposed_at.description: ISO8601 timestamp when this memory was proposed.

target_location.description: Where this memory would be written. Must be a valid path.

summary.description: One-line summary of the proposed memory. Must be non-empty.

status.description: Current status. Phase 0-5: only 'proposed' is allowed for new records. 'approved', 'rejected', and 'superseded' statuses are for use by human reviewers or future phases.

approved_at.description: ISO8601 timestamp when approved (set by human reviewer or future phase).

written_at.description: ISO8601 timestamp when actually written (future phase).

examples.summary: Batch A1 inventory discovered path drift D:\devFrame vs D:\dev-frame
